fish.name: Banded Butterflyfish
fish.features: Two wide, black midbody bands.
fish.mnemonic: Two thick black bands like warning tape across a butterfly body.

fish.name: Bandtail Puffer
fish.features: 1. Smooth skin | 2. Long body shape | 3. Dark area above, light with black dots below | 4. Banded tail
fish.mnemonic: Puffer with a banded tail: dark on top, light and speckled below, ring around the tail.

fish.name: Bar Jack
fish.features: 1. Bright blue-and-black border on back runs along dorsal fin and onto lower tail fin.
fish.mnemonic: The 'bar' is an electric blue-black stripe running along its back onto the lower tail.

fish.name: Belted Sandfish
fish.mnemonic: Small sand-dweller with body bars, like a plainer cousin of the Harlequin Bass.

fish.name: Bermuda Chub/Yellow Chub
fish.features: Gray to silver. "Football-shaped" body. (Note: Reliably distinguishing between these two species visually while underwater is considered impossible.)
fish.mnemonic: Two chub species, basically impossible to tell apart underwater: silver, football-shaped body.

fish.name: Bicolor Damselfish
fish.features: Black and white. 1. Forebody is usually black.
fish.mnemonic: BI-color = two colors, black front half, pale back half.

fish.name: Black Grouper
fish.features: 1. Long, stout body | 2. Series of dark, rectangular patterns under dorsal fin | 3. Back of dorsal fin, back of tail fin, back of anal fin are black
fish.mnemonic: Big stout grouper with dark rectangle patches and black-edged fins, the 'goth' grouper.

fish.name: Black Jack
fish.features: 1. Steep forehead | 2. Tall, stout body | 3. Dorsal and anal fins fairly long | 4. Row of black scutes extend from halfway on body to tail
fish.mnemonic: Steepest forehead of the jacks, tall stout body, scutes run halfway to the tail.

fish.name: Black Margate
fish.features: 1. Silvery body with wide, dark black bar behind pectoral fin | 2. Black fins all around
fish.mnemonic: Black bar behind the pectoral fin plus black fins all around, like black gloves and socks.

fish.name: Blue Chromis
fish.features: Brilliant blue.  | 1. Slender, deeply forked tail with dark borders.
fish.mnemonic: Electric blue with a deeply forked, dark-bordered tail, the brightest chromis.

fish.name: Bluehead
fish.features: 1. Blue head.  | 2. Two dark bars behind head, separated by white bar.
fish.mnemonic: Exactly what it says: blue head, with two dark bars separated by a white bar just behind it.

fish.name: Bluestriped Grunt
fish.features: 1. Dark tail and rear dorsal fin.  | 2. Blue stripes.
fish.mnemonic: Blue stripes plus a dark tail and rear dorsal fin, the 'blue' grunt.

fish.name: Brown Chromis
fish.features: Brown.  | 1. Border of dorsal fin and tips of tail fin yellow.  | 2. Dark spot around base of pectoral fin.
fish.mnemonic: Brown body, yellow-tipped dorsal and tail edges, dark smudge at the pectoral base, the plain chromis.

fish.name: Colon Goby
fish.features: 1. Body covered with small black/white specks | 2. Two vertical spots (like a colon) at base of tail | 3. Body translucent
fish.mnemonic: Tiny and speckled, named for two dots like a colon punctuation mark at the base of its tail.

fish.name: Creole Wrasse
fish.features: 1. Overall purple coloration | 2. Sometimes black lips and yellow blotches | 3. Often seen in large schools rapidly swimming on the reef
fish.mnemonic: Striking purple schooling wrasse, often seen racing over the reef in big groups.

fish.name: Crevalle Jack
fish.features: 1. Long, curved, silvery body | 2. Black dot on edge of upper gill cover | 3. Black spot on pectoral fin | 4. Curved dorsal and anal fins
fish.mnemonic: Black spot on the gill cover AND another on the pectoral fin, the double-black-dot jack.

fish.name: Doctorfish
fish.features: 1. Always have body bars (10-12), although they may be quite faint.
fish.mnemonic: Always has body bars, unlike the Ocean Surgeonfish which never does. Doctor checks every bar.

fish.name: Dog Snapper
fish.features: 1. Triangular white patch under eye | 2. Snapper body, usually white to cream colored
fish.mnemonic: White triangle patch under the eye, like a dog's white muzzle marking.

fish.name: Fairy Basslet
fish.features: 1. Bicolored – purple to violet front and yellow to gold rear.  | 2. Dark spot on dorsal fin.
fish.mnemonic: Tiny bicolor fish, purple front and gold back, with a dark spot on the dorsal fin.

fish.name: Foureye Butterflyfish
fish.features: Black spot, ringed in white, on rear body near upper base of tail.
fish.mnemonic: A fake fourth eye, a black spot ringed in white near the tail, fools predators about which end is the head.

fish.name: French Angelfish
fish.features: Black with bright yellow rims on scales. 1. Tail rounded.
fish.mnemonic: Black scales edged in bright yellow rims like gold French filigree, tail is rounded.

fish.name: French Grunt
fish.features: 1. Yellow stripes below lateral line set on diagonal.
fish.mnemonic: Yellow stripes running on a diagonal below the lateral line.

fish.name: Gag
fish.features: 1. Lines radiate from eyes | 2. Dusky dark to olive gray coloration | 3. Scrawled markings over body
fish.mnemonic: Radiating sunburst lines from the eye plus a dusky olive scrawled body.

fish.name: Goldentail Moray
fish.features: 1. Brown body covered with small yellow speckles | 2. Yellow ring around eye
fish.mnemonic: Golden-yellow speckles all over the body plus a yellow ring around the eye.

fish.name: Gray Angelfish
fish.features: Gray body.  | 1. Yellow inner face of pectoral fin.  | 2. Square-cut tail.
fish.mnemonic: Plain gray body, but the inside of the pectoral fin flashes yellow and the tail is squared off, not rounded like French Angelfish.

fish.name: Great Barracuda
fish.features: Silver. Long, cylindrical body. 1. Large underslung jaw, pointed teeth often obvious.
fish.mnemonic: Silver torpedo body with a huge underslung jaw full of teeth.

fish.name: Harlequin Bass
fish.features: 1. Dark, tiger-like bars.
fish.mnemonic: Dark tiger-like bars, a blocky harlequin pattern.

fish.name: Honeycomb Cowfish
fish.features: 1. Triangular shaped body | 2. Numerous honeycomb-shaped patterns on body | 3. Background color is yellowish to cream to bluish | 4. Two 'horns' protrude out from forehead | 5. Long, narrow base of tail (caudal peduncle)
fish.mnemonic: Triangular boxy body covered in honeycomb hexagon patterns, with two horns on the forehead like a cow.

fish.name: Horse-eye Jack
fish.features: 1. Large eye | 2. Usually schooling in midwater | 3. Yellow tail | 4. Dark dorsal fin | 5. Dark scutes along body
fish.mnemonic: Big horse-like eye, yellow tail, dark dorsal fin, usually schooling in midwater.

fish.name: Jackknife-Fish
fish.features: 1. White with a few black stripes | 2. Dorsal fin often held at about a 90 degree angle to body | 3. Thick black stripe from dorsal to tail outlined in thin white stripes | 4. Younger individuals have more of a yellowish tint
fish.mnemonic: Dorsal fin snaps up at a sharp angle like an open jackknife blade, thick black diagonal stripe.

fish.name: Leopard Toadfish
fish.features: 1. Large cirri under chin and around face | 2. Smaller spots on front, larger spots and patterns on back | 3. Pectoral, dorsal, and tail fins have dark edge with thin white line
fish.mnemonic: Leopard-spotted skin plus chin whiskers (cirri) like a catfish or toad.

fish.name: Longsnout Butterflyfish
fish.features: 1. Long, pointed snout | 2. Yellowish orange - darker on top, lighter on bottom | 3. Often swims upside down under ledges | 4. Usually found in deeper water
fish.mnemonic: Long pointy snout for picking food from crevices, often swims upside down under ledges.

fish.name: Ocean Surgeonfish
fish.features: Uniform color with no body bars.
fish.mnemonic: No body bars, ever, the blank surgeonfish, opposite of the Doctorfish.

fish.name: Orangespotted Filefish
fish.features: 1. White spot on upper tail base | 2. Small orange spots cover body | 3. Dull cream colored stripes extend to tail
fish.mnemonic: Small orange spots scattered over the body plus a white spot at the top of the tail base.

fish.name: Pinfish
fish.features: 1. Gold and blue stripes along the body | 2. Dusky spot centered on lateral line | 3. May have dusky bars | 4. Not in Caribbean or Bahamas
fish.mnemonic: Gold-and-blue pinstripes with a dusky spot on the lateral line.

fish.name: Porcupinefish
fish.features: 1. Elongated, rectangular shape | 2. Spines all over body, usually laying flat | 3. Black dots cover body AND fins | 4. Large black eyes
fish.mnemonic: Spines lying flat like a porcupine, black dots cover both body AND fins, big black eyes.

fish.name: Queen Angelfish
fish.features: 1. Dark blue spot on forehead, speckled and ringed with brilliant blue, forms the "crown."  | 2. Tail yellow.
fish.mnemonic: Blue-ringed crown spot on the forehead plus a yellow tail, royalty gets a crown.

fish.name: Redband Parrotfish
fish.features: 1. Small yellow blotch with two or more small black spots on upper forebody.  | 2. Usually salmon to orange or yellow band from corner of mouth to below eye.
fish.mnemonic: Small yellow forebody blotch with black spots, plus a salmon or orange band from mouth to eye, the red band on the face.

fish.name: Reef Croaker
fish.features: 1. Overall brown coloration with faintly darker broken stripes | 2. Likely hiding in a dark space | 3. Brown dot on pec fin base | 4. Tail yellowish
fish.mnemonic: Plain brown with faint broken stripes, usually hiding in a dark crevice, yellowish tail.

fish.name: Rock Beauty
fish.features: 1. Yellow to yellow-orange forebode and tail. 2. Mid and rear body black.
fish.mnemonic: Split exactly in half: yellow-orange front, black rear, a dramatic two-tone beauty.

fish.name: Sand Diver
fish.features: 1. Long, slender, tubular shaped body | 2. Usually resting on the bottom | 3. Broken stripes of gold and blue | 4. Several dark vertical bars | 5. Black dot on upper gill cover
fish.mnemonic: A lizardfish that dives into the sand to rest, gold and blue broken stripes, dark bars, black dot on the gill cover.

fish.name: Saucereye Porgy
fish.features: 1. Silver background | 2. Forked tail | 3. Strange swimming pattern - swims forward than abruptly stops in place | 4. Often a yellow wash over face
fish.mnemonic: Swims forward then abruptly freezes in place, silvery with a forked tail and often a yellow wash on the face.

fish.name: Sergeant Major
fish.features: 1. Five black body bars.  | 2. Upper lip does not overhang lower.
fish.mnemonic: Five black bars like sergeant's stripes on a uniform sleeve.

fish.name: Spanish Grunt
fish.features: 1. Hefty body and lips | 2. Silver body with black stripes and yellow on most fins | 3. Usually found near areas without much light (under ledges, overhangs, wrecks)
fish.mnemonic: Heftier lips and body than other grunts, black stripes with yellow fins, hides in dark ledges or wrecks.

fish.name: Spotfin Butterflyfish
fish.features: 1. Fins (except pectoral) bright yellow.  | 2. Black dot on outer edge of rear dorsal fin.
fish.mnemonic: All fins except the pectoral glow bright yellow, with one black dot on the rear dorsal fin.

fish.name: Spotted Goatfish
fish.features: 1. A row of three dark, rectangular body blotches is normally visible when fish are active (when resting, change to blotched or mottled reddish brown).  | 2. Two barbels under tip of chin.
fish.mnemonic: Three dark rectangle blotches down the side when active, plus chin barbels like a goat's beard.

fish.name: Spotted Trunkfish
fish.features: 1. White background with black dots | 2. White around mouth | 3. Odd, triangular shaped fish | 4. Spine near anal fin
fish.mnemonic: White body covered in black polka dots, boxy triangular trunk shape, spine near the anal fin.

fish.name: Stoplight Parrotfish
fish.features: 1. Bright yellow spot at upper corner of gill cover.  | 2. Yellow area at base of tail.  | 3. Salmon to yellow crescent on tail.
fish.mnemonic: Yellow spot at the gill cover like a stoplight, yellow tail base, salmon crescent tail.

fish.name: Striped Parrotfish
fish.features: 1. Blue edges on squared off tail | 2. Dark stripe along side, yellow near pectoral fin | 3. IP / Juv: No dark borders on tail (Princess Parrotfish has dark borders) | 4. IP / Juv: Yellow can be often seen on nose
fish.mnemonic: Blue-edged squared-off tail, dark side stripe, yellow near the pectoral fin.

fish.name: Sunshinefish
fish.features: 1. Juveniles: Yellow wash on top, purple below | 2. Adults: Brown with white lower body and fins. Purple wash over eye | 3. Both Juv and Adult usually found deeper
fish.mnemonic: Juveniles glow sunshine yellow on top, adults turn brown with a purple eye-wash, usually found deep.

fish.name: Townsend Angelfish (Hybrid Queen/Blue)
fish.features: 1. Having some markings from both Queen and Blue Angelfishes, which occasionally interbreed, resulting in this hybrid. | 2. Not found in Caribbean
fish.mnemonic: A Queen x Blue Angelfish hybrid, mixed markings from both parents, not a pure species.

fish.name: Trumpetfish
fish.features: Long, thin body.  | 1. Trumpet-like mouth.
fish.mnemonic: Long thin body ending in a literal trumpet-shaped mouth.

fish.name: Unidentified Silvery Fish (Silversides / Anchovies / Herrings)
fish.features: 1. Any unidentified silvery swimmer
fish.mnemonic: Catch-all for schools of silvery little fish you cannot ID down to species: silversides, anchovies, herring.

fish.name: Yellow Goatfish
fish.features: 1. Yellow tail and midbody stripe.  | 2. Two barbels under tip of chin.
fish.mnemonic: Yellow stripe down the body into the tail, plus chin barbels.

fish.name: Yellowhead Wrasse
fish.features: 1. Yellow head and forebody.  | 2. Dark midbody bar.
fish.mnemonic: Yellow head and front half, with a dark bar splitting it from the paler rear body.

fish.name: Yellowtail (Redfin) Parrotfish
fish.features: 1. TP overall blue-green body color with yellow tail | 2. Initial phase overall gray color with obvious scales and yellow squared-off tail
fish.mnemonic: Yellow squared-off tail on an otherwise blue-green or gray body.

fish.name: Yellowtail Damselfish
fish.features: Dark body. 1. Yellow tail.
fish.mnemonic: Dark body, bright yellow tail, the name says it all.

fish.name: Yellowtail Snapper
fish.features: 1. Brilliant yellow midbody stripe and tail.
fish.mnemonic: Brilliant yellow stripe running the length of the body straight into the tail.
